title: Sticky Pad Traps - 6 Pack Pest Sticky Boards Extra Strong Multi-Use Boards Sticky Catcher Effective for Home Household Outdoor Indoor Garage Garden
bullet_points: 💪 Insect Sticky Pest Catchers - Package includes 6 Packs Sticky Trap Boards. Size/One Piece: 21cm x 31cm. Our Multi-Use sticky traps can be placed inside your house without any problem. Our Multi-Use Board Sticky Trap Pads catch all sizes of insects

👉 Household Indoor Outdoor Use: It will be suitable for use in families, gardens, restaurants, bars, farms, offices, warehouses, kitchens, meeting rooms, behind appliances, under sinks, near garbage areas

👉 Where to Place: We suggest you position multi-use board sticky traps in the corner of the attic and basement, under large kitchen appliances, TV stand, near the dryer or oven, and inside cabinets, garages, fireplaces, underneath & behind furniture

👉 If using the sticky trap in an area with dust or other debris, fold the insect and insect sticky trap into a tunnel to protect the sticky trap. Recommend Food: peanut butter, fruit, meat, cookies, cheese, sausage
💪 Foldable Thicker Sticky Trap Board: Separate the paper boards and put some food in the middle of each board. The sticky trap can be folded into a tunnel if used in narrow areas
